issue_body_preview:
Arnaud threw together the following example of a chart which keeps growing vertically -

http://jsbin.com/deqema/edit?html,js,output

I'm not sure if there's anything we can/should do to fix this, as it relates to `svg` element's default `inline` display but it might be possible to do something in `
test_description_zh: 创建一个使用 d3fc 的图表，将其放置在一个容器中，观察图表在页面渲染后是否会持续不断地垂直增长（高度不断增加）。
expected_result_zh: 图表应保持稳定的尺寸，不会随着时间推移不断垂直增长，高度应固定或仅随容器大小变化而变化。
